rules: Keep token provenance when adapting a snippet.
Do not ship mature_review entries without explicit human curation.
Prefer transformed/adapted lines for final game text unless the exact collage text is intentionally being quoted.
Use snippets as EarthBound-style authored micro-text: signs, object checks, NPC barks, menu-board fragments, status/battle copy.

categories.label: Npc Bark
categories.description: Short lines NPCs can say while misreading Bosch or leaking scene logic.

categories.label: Inspect Text
categories.description: Object/check text for posters, signs, terminals, bedrooms, underpass junk, and environmental props.

categories.label: Shop Signage
categories.description: Shop signs, menu-board fragments, item descriptions, cashier flavor, and receipt language.

categories.label: Battle Text
categories.description: Battle verbs/status/error copy derived from snippets; this first pass stores sources for later rewriting.

categories.label: Item Or Enemy Name
categories.description: Names or descriptions for items, enemies, equipment, and props.

categories.label: Dream Milady Weirdness
categories.description: Surreal/Milady-layer fragments for dream pockets, terminals, memory leaks, and route-pressure moments.

categories.label: Mature Review
categories.description: Source text with drug/weapon/slur/sexual/violent/offensive risk. Keep for manual taste review; not runtime-safe by default.
